info.title: Financial Datasets API
info.description: Stock market API with real-time and historical financial data for 27,000+ tickers over 30+ years. Financial statements, equity prices, insider trades, SEC filings, and more.

tags.name: Financial Statements
tags.description: Access to income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements

tags.name: Company Information
tags.description: Company facts like ticker, name, and description

tags.name: Institutional Holdings
tags.description: SEC-direct 13F equity holdings of institutional investment managers

tags.name: Index Funds
tags.description: ETF and index-fund holdings, weights, and the funds that hold a given security

tags.name: Financial Metrics
tags.description: Financial ratios, metrics, and key performance indicators

tags.name: Macroeconomics
tags.description: Real-time and historical macroeconomic data like interest rates

tags.name: KPIs
tags.description: Sector-specific operational KPIs extracted from earnings releases.

get.description: Historical interest rates for all major central banks in the world.

parameters.name: bank
parameters.description: The bank whose interest rates to return. Use the /macro/interest-rates/banks endpoint to get a list of available banks.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The start date of the interest rates to return in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The end date of the interest rates to return in YYYY-MM-DD format.

get.description: Get the current interest rates from all major central banks in the world.

parameters.name: bank
parameters.description: The central bank code (e.g., FED, ECB, BOJ). Use the /macro/interest-rates/banks endpoint to get a list of available banks.

get.description: Get recent news articles for a specific company or the broad market. Pass a ticker for company-specific news, or omit the ticker for general market news. Articles are sourced from RSS feeds of publishers like The Motley Fool, Investing.com, Reuters, and more.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol of the company. Omit for broad market news.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of news articles to return (default: 5, max: 10).

post.description: Search for stocks by filtering across financial metrics from income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements.
Search for specific financial metrics across income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements for a list of tickers.

get.description: Get insider trades like buys and sells for a ticker by a company insider.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of transactions to return (default: 10).

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by insider name (e.g., 'Jen Hsun Huang'). Use the /insider-trades/names endpoint to get available names for a ticker.

parameters.name: transaction_type
parameters.description: Filter by transaction type (e.g., 'Open market sale', 'Gift'). Use the /insider-trades/transaction-types endpoint to get available types.

parameters.name: filing_date
parameters.description: Filter by exact filing date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: filing_date_gte
parameters.description: Filter by filing date greater than or equal to this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: filing_date_lte
parameters.description: Filter by filing date less than or equal to this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: filing_date_gt
parameters.description: Filter by filing date greater than this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: filing_date_lt
parameters.description: Filter by filing date less than this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

get.description: Query 13F institutional holdings by filer CIK or by held ticker. Provide exactly one of `filer_cik` or `ticker`. When no `report_period` filter is supplied, `?filer_cik=...` returns the filer's most recent 13F and `?ticker=...` returns one position per institutional filer whose most recent 13F currently includes the ticker (filers who have since dropped the position are excluded).

parameters.name: filer_cik
parameters.description: The 10-digit zero-padded SEC CIK of the institutional filer. Mutually exclusive with `ticker`.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The held security's ticker symbol. Mutually exclusive with `filer_cik`. Without a `report_period` filter, returns one position per institutional filer whose most recent 13F currently includes this ticker.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of positions to return (default: 10, max: 200).

get.summary: Find an investor's CIK by name (discovery)
get.description: Returns up to 100 distinct institutional filers (CIK + name). Use the optional `name` parameter for case-insensitive prefix search. No API key required.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Optional case-insensitive prefix to filter filer names (e.g., `BERK`).

get.summary: List tickers currently held by any 13F filer (discovery)
get.description: Returns the list of ticker symbols that appear as held securities across 13F filings. No API key required.

Query fund holdings in two directions. Provide exactly one of `ticker` or `holding`. `?ticker=SPY` returns a fund's constituents and each position's weight (the fund's latest filing by default, or the composition in effect on/before `as_of`). `?holding=AAPL` returns the funds whose latest filing holds that security, sorted by weight.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The fund's ticker symbol (e.g., `SPY`). Returns that fund's holdings. Mutually exclusive with `holding`.

parameters.name: holding
parameters.description: A held security's ticker symbol (e.g., `AAPL`). Returns the funds whose latest filing holds it. Mutually exclusive with `ticker`.

parameters.name: as_of
parameters.description: Only valid with `ticker`. Returns the fund composition in effect on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Without it, the fund's latest filing is returned.

parameters.name: asset_class
parameters.description: Only valid with `ticker`. Filter constituents by instrument type: `equity` or `bond`. Omit for all holdings.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of rows to return (default: 50, max: 1000).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of rows to skip, for pagination (default: 0).

200.description: Index fund holdings response. The shape depends on the query direction: `ticker` returns a fund header + constituents; `holding` returns a security header + funds.

get.description: Returns the list of fund ticker symbols available in the API. No API key required.
Get company facts for a ticker.

parameters.description: The ticker symbol.

parameters.name: cik

get.description: Get SEC filings for a company.

parameters.name: cik
parameters.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol.

parameters.name: filing_type
parameters.description: Filter by one or more filing types. Repeat the query parameter to pass multiple values (e.g. filing_type=10-Q&filing_type=10-K).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of filings to return (default: 10).

get.description: Get the raw text Items from an SEC filing.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol.

parameters.name: filing_type
parameters.description: The type of filing.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The year of the filing.

parameters.name: quarter
parameters.description: The quarter of the filing if 10-Q.

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: The item to get.

parameters.name: accession_number
parameters.description: The accession number of the filing if 8-K.

parameters.name: include_exhibits
parameters.description: Whether to include the raw text from linked exhibits. Only applicable for 8-K filings. When true, exhibit objects will include the 'text' field containing the full exhibit content.

get.description: Get the most recent earnings snapshot for a ticker. Optional estimate/surprise and change fields are returned only when available.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol (e.g. `AAPL`).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of most-recent **report periods** worth of filings to return, sorted by `(report_period DESC, filing_date ASC)`. The number of entries returned may exceed `limit` when a recent period has both an 8-K and a 10-Q / 10-K. Values above 40 are clamped to 40. Non-positive or non-integer values return 400.

Get sector-specific operational KPIs for a ticker. Includes metrics like load factor, CET1 ratio, same-store sales, FFO per share, and more. Sourced from SEC 8-K earnings releases.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol.

parameters.name: metric_name
parameters.description: Filter to a specific metric (e.g., load_factor, cet1_ratio).

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Filter by period type: quarterly or annual.

parameters.name: report_period_gte
parameters.description: Only return metrics on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: report_period_lte
parameters.description: Only return metrics on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of periods to return. Returns all metrics for the N most recent periods.

message.example: KPI endpoints are in early access. Contact support@financialdatasets.ai for access.

get.description: Returns a list of tickers that have KPI metrics available.
Returns a list of sectors that have KPI metrics available.

parameters.name: ticker

parameters.name: metric_name
parameters.description: Filter to a specific metric.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Filter by period type: quarterly or annual.

parameters.name: report_period_gte
parameters.description: Only return guidance on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: report_period_lte
parameters.description: Only return guidance on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of periods to return.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: The ticker symbol.

parameters.name: metric_name
parameters.description: Filter to a specific metric.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Filter by period type: quarterly or annual.

parameters.name: report_period_gte
parameters.description: Only return metrics on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: report_period_lte
parameters.description: Only return metrics on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of periods to return.

ReportPeriod.name: report_period
ReportPeriod.description: Filter by exact report period date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ReportPeriodGte.name: report_period_gte
ReportPeriodGte.description: Filter by report period greater than or equal to date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ReportPeriodLte.name: report_period_lte
ReportPeriodLte.description: Filter by report period less than or equal to date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ReportPeriodGt.name: report_period_gt
ReportPeriodGt.description: Filter by report period greater than date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

ReportPeriodLt.name: report_period_lt
ReportPeriodLt.description: Filter by report period less than date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

field.description: The criteria to filter on.  For financial metric fields, use 'gt', 'lt', 'gte', 'lte', 'eq' operators.  For 'ticker' and 'cik' fields, use the 'in' operator to filter against multiple values.

operator.description: The comparison operator. The 'in' operator can only be used with a field value of 'ticker' or 'cik' and lets you filter against multiple values.

oneOf.description: The value to compare against for single-value operators (gt, lt, gte, lte, eq)
Array of ticker or cik values to compare against when using the 'in' operator

filters.description: An array of filter objects to apply to the search.

items.description: The financial metric to search for.

line_items.description: An array of line items to apply to the search.

tickers.description: An array of tickers to apply to the search.

period.description: The time period for the financial data.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

report_period.description: The reporting period of the financial data.

period.description: The time period of the financial data.

currency.description: The currency of the financial data.

additionalProperties.description: Additional financial metrics based on the search criteria.

InstitutionalHoldingsResponse.description: Envelope keyed by `ticker` (ticker mode) or `filer_cik` (filer mode), with the position list under `institutional_holdings`.

ticker.description: Echoed back when the request used `?ticker=...` mode.

filer_cik.description: Echoed back when the request used `?filer_cik=...` mode.

cik.description: The 10-digit zero-padded SEC CIK of the institutional filer.

name.description: The filer's name as reported on its most recent 13F filing.

IndexFundHoldingsResponse.description: Forward response (`?ticker=...`): a fund header plus its constituents, sorted by weight descending.

ticker.description: The fund ticker echoed back from the request.

fund.description: Fund header: identity, the as-of period, and coverage counts for the full fund (not the returned page).

as_of.description: Reporting period of the filing the holdings are drawn from.

filing_date.description: Date the filing was submitted to the SEC.

total_net_assets.description: The fund's total net assets in USD (the weight denominator).

total_holdings.description: Total number of holdings in the fund for this period.

holdings_resolved.description: Number of holdings resolved to a ticker.

returned.description: Number of holdings in this page.

offset.description: The pagination offset echoed back from the request.

FundHolding.description: A single constituent of a fund. Identifiers are always present; `ticker` is null when the security has not been resolved to a ticker (e.g., some bonds and foreign securities).

ticker.description: Ticker of the held security, or null when unresolved.

weight.description: The position as a percent of the fund's net assets.

shares.description: Number of shares or principal amount held.

resolution_status.description: Identifier resolution state for this row (e.g., `resolved`).

IndexFundsForHoldingResponse.description: Reverse response (`?holding=...`): a security header plus the funds whose latest filing holds it, sorted by weight descending.

holding.description: The held-security ticker echoed back from the request.

security.description: Security header: the queried security plus result counts.

name.description: Security name (null when no fund holds it).

total_funds.description: Total funds whose latest filing holds the security (not the returned page).

returned.description: Number of funds in this page.

offset.description: The pagination offset echoed back from the request.

FundPosition.description: One fund's position in the queried security.

as_of.description: Reporting period of the fund's latest filing.

filing_date.description: Date the filing was submitted to the SEC.

weight.description: The security as a percent of this fund's net assets.

market_value.description: The fund's position value in USD.

shares.description: Shares or principal amount the fund holds.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

cik.description: The Central Index Key (CIK) of the company.

accession_number.description: The accession number of the filing.

revenue_chg.description: Percentage change in revenue versus the prior period as a decimal (e.g. 0.10 = +10%). Sequential in the quarterly payload, year-over-year in the annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

revenue_yoy_chg.description: Year-over-year change in revenue versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

estimated_revenue.description: Consensus analyst estimate for revenue. Returned only when available.

revenue_surprise.description: Revenue surprise classification versus estimate. Returned only when available.

revenue_surprise_pct.description: Signed magnitude of the revenue surprise as a decimal (e.g. 0.0196 = revenue came in 1.96% above estimate). Returned only when an estimate is available.

earnings_per_share_chg.description: Percentage change in EPS versus the prior period as a decimal. Sequential in the quarterly payload, year-over-year in the annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

earnings_per_share_yoy_chg.description: Year-over-year change in EPS versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

estimated_earnings_per_share.description: Consensus analyst estimate for diluted earnings per share. Returned only when available.

eps_surprise.description: EPS surprise classification versus estimate. Returned only when available.

eps_surprise_pct.description: Signed magnitude of the EPS surprise as a decimal (e.g. 0.5652 = EPS came in 56.52% above estimate). Returned only when an estimate is available.

gross_profit_chg.description: Percentage change in gross profit versus the prior period as a decimal. Sequential in the quarterly payload, year-over-year in the annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

gross_profit_yoy_chg.description: Year-over-year change in gross profit versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

gross_margin.description: Gross margin as a decimal (gross_profit / revenue). Returned only when calculable.

gross_margin_chg_bps.description: Absolute change in gross margin versus the prior period in basis points (e.g. 200.0 = margin expanded 200 bps). Returned only when calculable.

gross_margin_chg_pct.description: Percentage change in gross margin versus the prior period as a decimal. Returned only when calculable.

gross_margin_yoy_chg_bps.description: Year-over-year change in gross margin versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, in basis points. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

gross_margin_yoy_chg_pct.description: Year-over-year percentage change in gross margin versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

operating_income_chg.description: Percentage change in operating income versus the prior period as a decimal. Sequential in the quarterly payload, year-over-year in the annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

operating_income_yoy_chg.description: Year-over-year change in operating income versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

operating_margin.description: Operating margin as a decimal (operating_income / revenue). Returned only when calculable.

operating_margin_chg_bps.description: Absolute change in operating margin versus the prior period in basis points. Returned only when calculable.

operating_margin_chg_pct.description: Percentage change in operating margin versus the prior period as a decimal. Returned only when calculable.

operating_margin_yoy_chg_bps.description: Year-over-year change in operating margin versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, in basis points. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

operating_margin_yoy_chg_pct.description: Year-over-year percentage change in operating margin versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

net_income_chg.description: Percentage change in net income versus the prior period as a decimal. Sequential in the quarterly payload, year-over-year in the annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

net_income_yoy_chg.description: Year-over-year change in net income versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

net_margin.description: Net margin as a decimal (net_income / revenue). Returned only when calculable.

net_margin_chg_bps.description: Absolute change in net margin versus the prior period in basis points. Returned only when calculable.

net_margin_chg_pct.description: Percentage change in net margin versus the prior period as a decimal. Returned only when calculable.

net_margin_yoy_chg_bps.description: Year-over-year change in net margin versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, in basis points. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

net_margin_yoy_chg_pct.description: Year-over-year percentage change in net margin versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

net_cash_flow_from_operations_chg.description: Percentage change in net cash flow from operations versus the prior period as a decimal. Sequential in the quarterly payload, year-over-year in the annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

net_cash_flow_from_operations_yoy_chg.description: Year-over-year change in net cash flow from operations versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

net_cash_flow_from_investing_chg.description: Percentage change in net cash flow from investing versus the prior period as a decimal. Sequential in the quarterly payload, year-over-year in the annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

net_cash_flow_from_investing_yoy_chg.description: Year-over-year change in net cash flow from investing versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

net_cash_flow_from_financing_chg.description: Percentage change in net cash flow from financing versus the prior period as a decimal. Sequential in the quarterly payload, year-over-year in the annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

net_cash_flow_from_financing_yoy_chg.description: Year-over-year change in net cash flow from financing versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

capital_expenditure_chg.description: Percentage change in capital expenditure versus the prior period as a decimal. Sequential in the quarterly payload, year-over-year in the annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

capital_expenditure_yoy_chg.description: Year-over-year change in capital expenditure versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

free_cash_flow_chg.description: Percentage change in free cash flow versus the prior period as a decimal. Sequential in the quarterly payload, year-over-year in the annual payload. Returned only when calculable.

free_cash_flow_yoy_chg.description: Year-over-year change in free cash flow versus the same fiscal quarter one year prior, as a decimal. Quarterly payload only. Returned only when calculable.

source_type.description: The SEC form type backing this filing.

filing_date.description: Calendar day SEC accepted the filing, in Eastern Time (the SEC's operating timezone). Calendar-day pair to `filing_datetime`.

filing_datetime.description: Sub-day timestamp recording when SEC accepted the filing, in Eastern Time. Sourced from SEC's `acceptanceDateTime` field on the EDGAR submissions API. Pairs with `filing_date` (calendar-day precision of the same event).

filing_window.description: Market session at the moment SEC accepted the filing, evaluated in Eastern Time. PRE_MARKET = weekday 04:00–09:30 ET. DURING_MARKET = weekday 09:30–16:00 ET. AFTER_HOURS = weekday outside regular trading hours. WEEKEND = Saturday or Sunday. Null when filing_datetime is unavailable.

signals.description: Curated, market-moving insights distilled from this filing. Each item has a pre-rendered `headline`, structured `details`, and an `importance` ranking. Returned only when at least one signal fires for this entry; field is omitted otherwise. Capped at 8 per entry, ordered HIGH → MEDIUM → LOW.

accession_number.description: SEC accession number identifying the filing.

quarterly.description: Quarterly figures from this filing. Returned only when available.

annual.description: Annual figures from this filing. Returned only when available.

earnings.description: Flat list of SEC filings for the ticker, sorted by (report_period DESC, filing_date ASC). When `limit=N`, up to N report_periods worth of filings are returned; entry count may exceed N when a recent period has both an 8-K and a 10-Q/10-K.

Signal.description: A curated market-moving insight derived from this filing. Pre-rendered `headline` is suitable for direct display; `details` carries structured fields for filtering and programmatic use. Signals are returned in priority order (most material first); the `type` itself encodes magnitude (e.g. `STRONG_REVENUE_INCREASE` vs `REVENUE_INCREASE`).

type.description: Signal category. EPS_BEAT/EPS_MISS: actual EPS vs analyst estimate. REVENUE_BEAT/REVENUE_MISS: actual revenue vs estimate. MARGIN_EXPANSION/MARGIN_CONTRACTION: any of gross/operating/net margin moved year-over-year by ≥100bps. GUIDANCE_RAISED/GUIDANCE_LOWERED/GUIDANCE_REAFFIRMED/GUIDANCE_INITIATED: forward-looking guidance change reported in the filing. SEGMENT_OUTPERFORMANCE/SEGMENT_UNDERPERFORMANCE: best- or worst-performing reportable segment by organic revenue growth. NON_GAAP_DIVERGENCE: an adjusted/non-GAAP figure differs materially from its GAAP counterpart on the same period. BACKLOG_SURGE/BACKLOG_DECLINE: backlog or remaining performance obligations moved year-over-year by ≥20%. REVENUE_INCREASE/STRONG_REVENUE_INCREASE and DECLINE variants: tiered year-over-year revenue change (≥10% / ≥20% magnitude). NET_INCOME_INCREASE/STRONG_NET_INCOME_INCREASE and DECLINE variants: tiered year-over-year net income change (≥15% / ≥30%). EPS_INCREASE/STRONG_EPS_INCREASE and DECLINE variants: tiered year-over-year EPS change (≥15% / ≥30%); independent from net income because share buybacks can amplify EPS movement. CAPEX_INCREASE/STRONG_CAPEX_INCREASE and DECLINE variants: tiered year-over-year capital expenditure change in spending magnitude (≥15% / ≥30%).

metric.description: The metric this signal references, when applicable (e.g. `revenue`, `earnings_per_share`, `operating_margin`, or a guidance/KPI metric name).

period.description: The fiscal period the signal references (e.g. `2026-Q1`, `FY 2026`). Forward guidance signals reference the guided period; financial signals reference the reporting period of this filing.

headline.description: Pre-rendered, human-readable summary suitable for direct display.

details.description: Structured fields specific to the signal type. Contents vary: surprise signals carry `actual`, `estimate`, `surprise_pct`; guidance signals carry `low`, `high`, `point_estimate`, `prior_value`, `revision_pct`; segment signals carry `best`, `worst`, `spread_pp`; non-GAAP signals carry `gaap_field`, `non_gaap_value`, `gaap_value`, `divergence_pct`; growth signals carry `current`, `yoy_chg`. Null values are omitted. Refer to type-specific examples.

value.description: Beta coefficient of stock monthly returns vs benchmark monthly returns.

benchmark.description: Benchmark ticker used for beta calculation.

n_observations.description: Number of overlapping monthly observations used.

r_squared.description: Coefficient of determination for the OLS fit.

price_type.description: Price type used to compute returns.

reason.description: Present when value is null due to insufficient or invalid input data.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

market_cap.description: The total market capitalization (stock price × shares outstanding).

enterprise_value.description: The total value of the company (market cap + debt - cash).

gross_margin.description: Gross profit as a percentage of revenue.

operating_margin.description: Operating income as a percentage of revenue.

net_margin.description: Net income as a percentage of revenue.

return_on_equity.description: Net income as a percentage of shareholders' equity.

return_on_assets.description: Net income as a percentage of total assets.

return_on_invested_capital.description: Net operating profit after taxes as a percentage of invested capital.

asset_turnover.description: Revenue divided by average total assets.

inventory_turnover.description: Cost of goods sold divided by average inventory.

receivables_turnover.description: Revenue divided by average accounts receivable.

days_sales_outstanding.description: Average accounts receivable divided by revenue over the period.

working_capital_turnover.description: Revenue divided by average working capital.

current_ratio.description: Current assets divided by current liabilities.

quick_ratio.description: Quick assets divided by current liabilities.

cash_ratio.description: Cash and cash equivalents divided by current liabilities.

operating_cash_flow_ratio.description: Operating cash flow divided by current liabilities.

debt_to_equity.description: Total debt divided by shareholders' equity.

debt_to_assets.description: Total debt divided by total assets.

earnings_per_share_growth.description: Growth in earnings per share over the period.

free_cash_flow_growth.description: Growth in free cash flow over the period.

operating_income_growth.description: Growth in operating income over the period.

ebitda_growth.description: Growth in EBITDA over the period.

payout_ratio.description: Dividends paid as a percentage of net income.

earnings_per_share.description: Net income divided by weighted average shares outstanding.

book_value_per_share.description: Shareholders' equity divided by shares outstanding.

free_cash_flow_per_share.description: Free cash flow divided by shares outstanding.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

issuer.description: The name of the issuing company.

is_board_director.description: Whether the insider is a board director.

transaction_shares.description: The number of shares involved in the transaction.

transaction_price_per_share.description: The price per share in the transaction.

transaction_value.description: The total value of the transaction.

shares_owned_before_transaction.description: The number of shares owned before the transaction.

shares_owned_after_transaction.description: The number of shares owned after the transaction.

security_title.description: The title of the security involved in the transaction.

transaction_type.description: A human-readable description of the transaction type.

filing_date.description: The date the transaction was filed.

InstitutionalHolding.description: A single position from a 13F filing. When the filer split voting authority across multiple subsidiary managers, the top-level fields aggregate shares and value across the splits and the underlying rows appear in `subsidiaries`.

ticker.description: The ticker symbol of the held security. May be null if the CUSIP could not be resolved.

name_of_issuer.description: Issuer name as reported on the 13F.

report_period.description: The reporting period (quarter end) of the filing.

filing_date.description: The date the filing was submitted to the SEC.

accession_number.description: The SEC accession number for this filing.

title_of_class.description: Security class as reported (e.g., `COM`, `COM CL A`, `PREF`).

put_call.description: Set to `Put` or `Call` for option positions; `null` for the underlying equity.

shares.description: Number of shares (or principal amount) held.

value_usd.description: Position market value in USD as reported on the 13F.

reported_price.description: Per-share price implied by the reported value and shares (the 13F equivalent of Dataroma's `Reported Price`). May be null when our price lookup is unavailable for this CUSIP.

filer_cik.description: Present only in ticker-mode responses. The 10-digit SEC CIK of the filer.

filer_name.description: Present only in ticker-mode responses. The filer's name.

subsidiaries.description: Present only when the position aggregates multiple SEC information-table rows (voting authority splits). Omitted for single-row positions.

InstitutionalHoldingSubsidiary.description: One SEC information-table row underlying a position (voting-authority split).

row_num.description: Zero-indexed row number from the SEC information table.

shares_principal_amount_type.description: `SH` for shares; `PRN` for principal amount (debt-like instruments).

other_managers.description: SEC `OtherManagers` identifiers indicating which subsidiary manager reported this row.

segment.description: Breakdowns by business or operating segment.

SegmentMetadata.description: Common metadata fields for all segment responses.

fiscal_period.description: The fiscal period (e.g., Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, FY).

currency.description: The reporting currency (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).

revenue.description: Revenue broken down by product and/or segment.

operating_income.description: Operating income broken down by segment.

long_lived_assets.description: Long-lived assets broken down by segment.

capital_expenditure.description: Capital expenditure broken down by segment.

AsReportedNode.description: A node in the as-reported financial statement tree. Recursively nested via `children`.

label.description: The label as printed on the face of the filing.

full_label.description: The canonical taxonomy label for the underlying concept.

value.description: The numeric value as reported. Null for section headers and subtotals with no direct value.

children.description: Nested line items beneath this row.

NotFoundError.description: The specified resource was not found

PaymentRequiredError.description: The request requires a paid subscription

example.message: This endpoint requires a paid subscription. Please upgrade your plan.

ServiceUnavailableError.description: Filing parse in progress. The request reached the deadline before the parse completed; the parse continues in the background and will be cached. Retry after the duration in the Retry-After header.

Retry-After.description: Number of seconds to wait before retrying the request.

example.message: We are processing this filing. Please retry in ~30 seconds.
